text:
Created attachment 232636
lam79

- version update from 7.3 to 7.9
- fixed sample configuration files
- fixed php depends


LAM 7.9 with multiple roots in tree view and custom script improvements
LAM 7.8 with restyling and PowerDNS support
LAM 7.7 with OpenID and OpenLDAP TOTP support
LAM 7.6 goes cloud native and fully supports PHP 8
LAM 7.5 supports to copy accounts and adds basic PHP 8 compatibility
LAM 7.4 supports Okta 2FA and admin approval for account registration
